name: design-research-conflict-suite
description: Conflict benchmark layer for testing whether the planner detects incoherent biology, stays cautious, and explains the main contradiction clearly.

checkObject.must: Checks that must pass for the case.
checkObject.mustNot: Checks that must stay false or absent for the case.

cases.prompt: best conjugate for extracellular amyloid plaque binding with intracellular-only splice rescue payload logic in Alzheimer disease

must.reason: extracellular target logic fighting intracellular-only payload logic should keep winner confidence low.
the planner should explicitly signal that the biology is mismatched.
a useful clarifier should appear if it can resolve the target/mechanism conflict.

mustNot.reason: the planner should not act highly confident in a target/mechanism contradiction case.

cases.prompt: best cytotoxic ADC strategy for rheumatoid arthritis

must.reason: chronic non-oncology disease plus explicit cytotoxic intent should stay cautious.
the planner should call out the non-oncology vs cytotoxic conflict clearly.

mustNot.reason: the planner should not overcommit to a cytotoxic winner in rheumatoid arthritis.

cases.prompt: best unconstrained antibody-drug conjugate for Parkinson's disease with no transport or barrier assumptions
cases.category: barrier-limited disease with implausible delivery assumptions

must.reason: barrier-limited disease plus unconstrained large-format delivery assumptions should keep confidence low.
the planner should explain the barrier-vs-delivery conflict clearly.
the planner should ask for the missing transport or entry-handle assumption.

mustNot.reason: the planner should not be highly confident in an implausible unconstrained-delivery Parkinson's case.

cases.prompt: best conjugate for soluble TGF-beta neutralization using intracellular-only siRNA knockdown payload logic in systemic sclerosis
cases.category: extracellular target with intracellular-only mechanism logic

must.reason: extracellular target logic and intracellular-only RNAi logic should keep winner confidence low.
the planner should clearly flag the extracellular-vs-intracellular logic conflict.

mustNot.reason: the planner should not sound highly certain when the mechanism logic is internally contradictory.

cases.prompt: best non-cytotoxic pathway-modulating oligo conjugate for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer

must.reason: oncology target-conditioned prompts with non-cytotoxic oligo intent should be treated cautiously unless the biology really supports it.
the planner should explain the tension between the oncology target context and the non-cytotoxic oligo intent.

mustNot.reason: the planner should not overcommit when the prompt mixes a classical oncology target with a nonstandard payload logic.
